sys_script_include.description:
Includes Task related server scripts: 2.8.5 | 2024-11-19 | RAJ | 2023-11-06 | raj | STRY0156233 - Reassign Reviewer in the "Send to Review" Modal 2.8.5 | 2024-10-14 | RAJ | STRY0154923 - Workflow Issue - move all updates that require additional processing into an event. Remove setWorkflow(false) from task object 2.8.4x - Patch | 2024-04-09 | raj | DFCT0012386 - Fix Script "OU Abbreviation Update Tasker Numb" cannot be run from the Background Script in for any customer (allow all scopes) 2.8.3 | 2023-05-24 |raj | STRY0140267 - Task Administrator Email 2.8.0 | 2022-09-21| raj | STRY0130088 - 2.8 Certifier requested updates - 6. isLoading in OnChange ClientScript 2.8.0 | 2022-08-30| raj | DFCT0011135 - "Rejection for Approval" Modal does NOT display (2) lines of text on the Tasker Portal. Please read the description 2.8.0 | 2022-08-14 | raj | STRY0125927 - All Mark Complete modals- Add info message "Marking complete will delete Draft Tasks" 2.8 | 2022-07-24 | raj | DFCT0011046 - "Rejection for Approval" Modal is NOT displaying any data and the buttons label names. Should display Data and the UI actions. 2.8 | 2022-06-26 | raj | DFCT0011050 - state of a task was being changed back from closed while deleting draft tasks 2.8 | 2022-06-26 | raj | STRY0111263 - Rejecting an Approval Task- Enhance cascade closing tasks to 'Descendants of Parent Approval' and 'Task Order' 2.8 | 2022-06-26 | raj | STRY0116802 - ICE- Fix Script - Update Tasker Number if doesn't match Primary Assignee 2.8 | 2022-06-07 | raj | STRY0122882 - Publish Task(s) button- New Modal to 'Choose Which Tasks to Publish' 2.8 | 2022-06-06 | raj | STRY0122878 - Update "Wait State" to NOT wait for Drafts 2.8 | 2022-06-05 | raj | STRY0122215 - Banner Notification- New Filter in called "My Tasks with Subtasks Completed" 2.8 | 2022-06-02 | raj | STRY0122589 - New Subtask Form- Allow "Draft Subtasks" under Active Tasks 2.8 | 2022-04-12 | mmcc | STRY0113587 - Mass Reopen Task Modal- Update Labels for UX getDescendantsCount() can filter on closed_at 2.7.3 | 2022-05-04 | raj | DFCT0010884 - All child/descendant tasks of an ORDERED TASK should be in "WAIT" state until the earlier order task has been completed
v2.7 STRY0095102 - Stretch- HHS/ICE: The "Task" form and "Template" form field filters should account for users that have a "Parent" (Restricted) Group STRY0105125 - DIA - Draft Scheduled Tasks - Banner Notification STRY0105845 - As a system, I need a draft task state in order to fulfill customer needs 2.7.0 | 2021-10-8 | mmcc | STRY0109110 - Draft Scheduled Tasks – UI – Delete Modal- Add Descendant tasks count Added getDescendantsCount(); params is an object with two fields: taskSysId and countType 2.7.0 | 2021-10-18 | mmcc | STRY0108860 - DIA- Completed from Top Task Notification Made params.countType test for 'EXCLUDE_CLOSE'; do not count Completed, Closed Incomplete and Cancelled tasks
2.6 STRY0091307 - Advanced Task - (Suspense Dates) - find all suspense date where the parent suspense date is earlier than a child supsense date STRY0091251 - TUP - (Estimated Duration Calculation) - calculate Estimated Duration for a full tree to show Task Templates where Parent is not long enough Performance Update
2.5 Patch 3 STRY0082087 - Restricted Group - (Portal & Platform)Task Form - Confirmation message - Restricted group selected after user selects OUs or Assigned Members STRY0083025 - Restricted Group - (Portal & Platform) Template form - Confirmation message - Restricted group selected after user selects OUs or Assigned Members STRY0083027 - Restricted Group - (Portal & Platform) Template Task form - Confirmation message - Restricted group selected after user selects OUs or Assigned Members STRY0084582 - FIX- ICE: SEQ - Parent Task dependent on its Subtasks in Assigned or Unassigned state goes into Waiting State when additional Subtasks are created STRY0085438 - FIX: Javascript error on new "Modals" STRY0085700 - UI: Restricted Group "Confirmation" text is not wrapping within the modal
v2.5.13: - STRY0076605: getInitialState and getUpdateState for Waiting States - STRY0076789: setCountActiveSubTasks
v2.5.11: - STRY0057360: New method for DTLV: getAncestors
sys_script_include.name: TaskerHelpers
